Function reference

All functions

gg_area()
Area ggplot
gg_bar()
Bar ggplot
gg_bin2d()
Bin2d ggplot
gg_blank()
Blank ggplot
gg_boxplot()
Boxplot ggplot
gg_col()
Col ggplot
gg_crossbar()
Crossbar ggplot
gg_density()
Density ggplot
gg_errorbar()
Errorbar ggplot
gg_freqpoly()
Freqpoly ggplot
gg_function()
Function ggplot
gg_hex()
Hex ggplot
gg_histogram()
Histogram ggplot
gg_jitter()
Jitter ggplot
gg_label()
Label ggplot
gg_line()
Line ggplot
gg_linerange()
Linerange ggplot
gg_path()
Path ggplot
gg_point()
Point ggplot
gg_pointrange()
Pointrange ggplot
gg_polygon()
Polygon ggplot
gg_qq()
Qq ggplot
gg_raster()
Raster ggplot
gg_rect()
Rect ggplot
gg_ribbon()
Ribbon ggplot
gg_segment()
Segment ggplot
gg_sf()
Sf ggplot
gg_smooth()
Smooth ggplot
gg_step()
Step ggplot
gg_text()
Text ggplot
gg_theme()
Quick theme for a ggplot
gg_tile()
Tile ggplot
gg_violin()
Violin ggplot
pal_blue
ggblanket blue used for no colour aesthetic.
pal_grey
ggblanket grey used for NA.
pal_hue
ggblanket hue palette.
